ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the manager oversees */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the manager */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position title of the manager */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Location of the department the manager oversees */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the manager has been in their current position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor, Master) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study (e.g., Computer Science, Business Administration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed description of job responsibilities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of required skills for the job role */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance metrics associated with the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_period" TEXT /* Review period (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Score given during the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer (manager or HR) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., Annual, Mid-Year) */,
  "review_cycle" TEXT /* Review cycle (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Performance, Conduct, Teamwork) */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas for improvement identified in the feedback */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up on the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentoring_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mentoring program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the mentoring program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mentoring program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mentoring program in months */,
  "mentoring_goals" TEXT /* Goals of the mentoring program */,
  "mentoring_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the mentoring program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_requirements" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for travel requirements */,
  "travel_type" TEXT /* Type of travel (e.g., Travel_Frequently, Travel_Rarely) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of travel requirements */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of travel (e.g., Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "travel_budget" REAL /* Travel budget allocated for the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_hikes" (
  "hike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary hike entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the salary hike */,
  "hike_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the salary hike */,
  "hike_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary hike */,
  "hike_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary hike was granted */,
  "current_salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary after the hike */,
  "hike_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the new salary takes effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee undertaking the training */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion of the training */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in hours */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "training_outcomes" TEXT /* Outcomes of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES mentoring_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for relationship entries */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the relationship */,
  "relationship_score" INTEGER /* Score rating the relationship satisfaction */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., peer, manager) */,
  "related_employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related employee (e.g., peer, manager) */,
  "relationship_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the relationship in months */,
  "relationship_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the relationship (e.g., Positive, Neutral, Negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_life_balance" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for work-life balance entries */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing feedback */,
  "balance_score" INTEGER /* Score rating the work-life balance satisfaction */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding work-life balance */,
  "flexibility" TEXT /* Level of work flexibility (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "stress_level" INTEGER /* Stress level of the employee (1-5 scale) */,
  "work_hours" INTEGER /* Average number of work hours per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the statistic relates */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Attribute being measured (e.g., performance, satisfaction) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measured attribute */,
  "statistic_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic (e.g., Survey, Performance Review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)
